markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and review recent development work.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** The strategy will shift to support two new themes—"AI in Action" and "Stop AI Slop"—to drive SEO for the upcoming Code Review feature.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**Code Review Launch:** The new feature will launch to select users in \~2 weeks (early Nov), with a GA planned for late Nov.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [**Augie CLI Commands:** Augment's team will create 20 high-quality command examples to serve as a foundation for AI-generated variations, replacing the current low-quality scraped list.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**KPIs & PRs:** Sylvain will deliver GrowthX's KPIs by EOW. GrowthX must address bot feedback on the blog categories PR before it can be merged.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [**Problem:** Existing content is stagnating or dropping in traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new strategy will support two themes, aligning content with the product roadmap and new ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [**1. AI in Action:** Focus on practical AI use (tips, customer stories) to drive traffic to the Augie CLI.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [**2. Stop AI Slop:** Anchor on code quality to support the new Code Review feature.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
          - [**SEO Focus:** "AI Code Quality," "AI Slop," "Context Rot," "AI Code Review."](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
          - [**Competitive Keywords:** "alternatives to Greptile," "alternatives to Graphite."](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)

### Code Review Feature Launch

  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
      - [**Early Nov (\~2 weeks):** Launch to select users.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
      - [**Late Nov:** General Availability (GA).](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Built directly from user feedback. Users requested Augment's superior Context Engine for code review, as they were hitting limits with tools like Greptile and Factor.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Goal:** Shift from being a "backup solution" to a primary tool.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [**User Acquisition Insights:**](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [**Primary Source:** Self-attributed "Google" (likely organic).](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [**Key Search Intent:** Users seek solutions for "large code bases," "legacy code," and specific languages (e.g., "Java").](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

### Augie CLI Commands

  - [**Problem:** The initial list of scraped command examples is low-quality and misaligned with the product's "task macro" vision.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**Solution:** Augment's team will create 20 high-quality examples to serve as a strong foundation for AI-generated variations.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [**Status:** 13 commands are complete; 7+ more are due this week.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

### Housekeeping & Logistics

  - [**PRs:**](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
      - [**Blog Categories PR:** Requires addressing bot feedback before merging.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
      - [**Other PRs:** Can be merged directly.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [**Reddit Accounts:** Geo experiments are on hold pending delivery of accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [**KPIs:** Sylvain will deliver GrowthX's KPIs by EOW, derived from the new $6M net new ARR company goal.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sylvain:**](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
      - [Deliver GrowthX's KPIs by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
      - [Review Augie CLI design.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [**Augment Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [Create 7+ more Augie CLI examples this week.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
      - [Address bot feedback on the blog categories PR.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
      - [Tag Sylvain as a reviewer on the updated PR.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
      - [Begin remapping content strategy to support new themes.](https://fathom.video/share/cm3fzoHJLNycsryeK_FyXKZDNnxYsaa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
